descricao: Monday through Friday, publishes approved course stories to the corresponding unit's Instagram and Facebook, with temporary upload to AWS S3.
problema: Daily story publishing across multiple social media accounts was done manually, consuming the marketing team's time.
resultado: Automatic publishing at set times, across multiple Instagram and Facebook accounts.
metrica: Automatic daily publishing across multiple social accounts
destaques: Publishing to multiple accounts per unit
Temporary S3 storage with automatic cleanup
